macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US National Debt Surpasses 100% of GDP
items.summary: The US national debt held by the public exceeded 100% of GDP for the first time since World War II in March. It currently stands at $38.97 trillion as of May 1, projected to double over the next three decades amid heavy spending.

items.title: Q1 GDP Grows 2%, Below Expectations
items.summary: US first-quarter GDP expanded at 2%, slightly under the forecasted 2.3%, driven by equipment investment in AI and computers alongside consumer spending.

items.title: Fed Chair Powell Declines Retirement Post-Term
items.summary: Jerome Powell announced he will not retire after his term ends next month, committing to serve as a constructive Fed governor without acting as a shadow chair.

items.title: Gas Prices Surge to $4.39 per Gallon
items.summary: The AAA national average for regular gas rose over nine cents in one day, from $4.30 on Thursday to $4.392 on Friday.

items.title: 30-Year Mortgage Rates Climb to 6.3%
items.summary: The average 30-year fixed mortgage rate increased to 6.3% this week from 6.23% last week, per Freddie Mac data.

items.title: Total US Household Debt Hits $18.8 Trillion
items.summary: US total household debt reached $18.8 trillion in the latest report.

items.title: US New Home Sales Plunge 17.6%
items.summary: US new home sales dropped 17.6% month-over-month, far below the expected 3.9% gain.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitmain Increases ETH Staking to 83% of Holdings
items.summary: Bitmain has significantly increased its Ethereum staking position to approximately 83% of its ETH holdings, up from 70%, representing a substantial commitment to the network.

items.title: Iran's Nobitex Exchange Handles Majority of Domestic Crypto Transactions
items.summary: Nobitex, a cryptocurrency exchange allegedly linked to Iranian officials, processes approximately 70% of all cryptocurrency transactions in Iran and has facilitated hundreds of millions in transactions for sanctioned entities, according to blockchain analysis.

items.title: U.S. Cryptocurrency Regulatory Framework Advances with Clarity Act and Genius Act
items.summary: Two major cryptocurrency regulatory acts are advancing: the Clarity Act for general cryptocurrencies and the Genius Act specifically for stablecoins, shaping the regulatory landscape for digital assets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Tesla Bot Gen 3 Unveiled with Major Upgrades Over Gen 2
items.summary: Tesla Bot Gen 3 demonstrates significant improvements including enhanced AI capabilities, smoother movement, and better real-world performance. The new generation will use the AI5 chip and features improved dexterity, balance, and learning speed compared to Gen 2.

items.title: Codex Introduces New 'Pet' Feature for Developers
items.summary: The Codex app has launched a new Pet feature allowing developers to select built-in animated companions and create custom pets through the 'Hatch Pet' functionality, providing an enhanced user interface experience.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Bomberman Online Restored for Dreamcast After 23 Years
items.summary: Bomberman Online for Dreamcast is now playable online again thanks to developers flyinghead and Farkus, who restored full multiplayer functionality after a 23-year server outage. The game supports up to 8 players via modem or broadband adapter.

items.title: CCP Games Repurchases Itself from Pearl Abyss in EVE Online Deal
items.summary: CCP Games has bought itself back from Pearl Abyss at a lower price than originally paid, allowing its management to regain control after years of challenges. The move follows Pearl Abyss' strategic decision to part ways.

items.title: Surprise Restocks of Pokémon TCG Sets at Pokémon Center
items.summary: Popular Pokémon Trading Card Game sets Ascended Heroes and Phantasmal Flames have seen unexpected restocks on the Pokémon Center website. Fans who missed them earlier now have another chance to purchase.

items.title: Monster Hunter Wilds Expansion News Expected Soon
items.summary: Major updates for the Monster Hunter Wilds expansion are anticipated this summer, possibly announced at Summer Game Fest, sparking discussions on whether Artian Weapons should remain endgame dominant.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Palo Alto Networks acquires Portkey for $120M-$140M to bolster AI agent security
items.summary: Cybersecurity giant Palo Alto Networks has agreed to acquire AI gateway startup Portkey, valued at $120M-$140M, to enhance defenses for autonomous AI systems.

items.title: Microsoft previews modern Windows Run dialog with dark mode and faster performance
items.summary: Microsoft is testing a new modern Run dialog in Windows 11 preview builds, featuring dark mode support and improved speed over the legacy version.

items.title: Microsoft brings Xbox console-like mode to Windows 11 PCs
items.summary: Microsoft's Xbox mode, providing a console interface, is starting to roll out to Windows 11 PCs.

items.title: Apple reports best-ever March quarter with iPhone sales up 21.6%
items.summary: Apple posted record March quarter results, driven by a 21.6% increase in iPhone sales.

items.title: Tim Cook passes Apple leadership to hardware head John Ternus
items.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook is handing over leadership to hardware executive John Ternus.

items.title: TSMC completes full exit from UK chip designer Arm with $231M share sale
items.summary: TSMC has sold its remaining shares in Arm for $231M, marking a complete exit from the UK chip designer.

items.title: Nissan abandons plans for US EV plant, scrapping 200,000 EVs/year goal
items.summary: Nissan has canceled its planned US electric vehicle factory that was set to produce 200,000 EVs annually.

items.title: Toilet maker Toto invests in ceramics division to address NAND memory RAM crisis
items.summary: Toto, a Japanese toilet manufacturer, is boosting investment in its ceramics unit used for NAND memory production amid chip shortages.

items.title: cPanel flaw CVE-2026-41940 mass-exploited in 'Sorry' ransomware attacks
items.summary: A critical cPanel vulnerability is being widely exploited to deploy 'Sorry' ransomware, breaching websites and encrypting data.

items.title: Edu tech firm Instructure discloses cybersecurity incident
items.summary: Instructure, maker of the Canvas learning platform, revealed a recent cyber incident and is investigating its impact.
